result:
**Infrastructure Operations Log — Compressed (2026-07-19)**

**Scope:** 15+ microservices (report-builder, export-pipeline, cache-warmer, ingest-api, billing-worker, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, metrics-collector, notification-daemon, search-indexer, auth-service, audit-logger, session-manager, payment-gateway, webhook-relay) across 6+ environments (production, staging, canary, dev sandbox, blue/green pools, QA cluster).

**Overall Activity:** ~90+ operations executed on 2026-07-19, including scale, patch, migrate, drain, rollback, upgrade, downgrade, restart, pause, resume, redeploy, inspect, health-check, reconfigure. No customer impact observed across all operations.

**Operations Summary:**
- Most operations completed without errors or stabilized error rates/alerts
- Retry queues drained to zero after operations; CPU/latency/memory recovered to baseline within minutes to hour
- ~8 manual retries required (primarily: billing-worker in green pool, metrics-collector in green pool, user-profile-service in QA cluster, search-indexer in production, auth-service in dev sandbox)
- Some operations took longer than expected (ingest-api redeploy, export-pipeline drain, payment-gateway redeploy); ~10 emitted warnings/stalls but resolved with brief recovery windows
- Postmortem notes added to runbooks for ~12 operations; follow-up config tidying tasks filed

**High-Activity Services:**
- audit-logger: 6 ops (restart, rollback, downgrade, scale down, redeploy, resume); alerts cleared, memory reduced
- export-pipeline: 5 ops (downgrade, migrate, rollback, drain); latency normalized, memory reduced
- billing-worker: 5 ops (redeploy, pause, scale down, reconfigure, inspect); queue stable, 1 manual retry
- payment-gateway: 5 ops (downgrade, scale up, inspect, migrate, redeploy); error rate stabilized, alerts cleared
- scheduler-core: 4 ops (scale up, drain, upgrade); queue depth stable
- metrics-collector, auth-service: 2-3 ops each; alerts cleared, latency normalized
- Others: 1-3 ops each; all stable

**Reference IDs:** Dashboard UID: AFEYWWMK | Rollback tag: AAMDUJMC | Registry token: PYTUVJ57 | Incident #: D7MTCCSR | License: XSQ4SCRC | Feature flag: WUS8R9QA | Build hash: SCME7XXQ | Cron ID: 9XT7R828

**Current Status:** All environments nominal, pager quiet, no critical alerts. Logs archived; documentation and runbooks updated; changes announced in ops channel. End-of-shift: green.
